note: Projects are consumed by components via import.

title: Data100: Project B2 — Spam Email Classification
desc: Classified emails as spam or not spam using machine learning on real-world text data. Note: in these experiments models did not overfit the dataset, so I used a very large vocabulary (informally: 'infinite words').
shortDesc: Classified emails as spam or not spam using ML on real-world text data. Note: models did not overfit; very large vocabulary used.
